content_en:
Before dying, everyone should write or dictate a will giving away up to one third of their wealth to those who would not inherit from them based on the inheritance laws. This recommendation was instituted by the Allaah to protect the rights of non-inheriting relatives and friends. It is under this principle of waseeyah that Muslims may leave wealth for non-Muslim relatives or receive wealth from dead non-Muslim relatives. According to Islamic law, wealth obtained by waseeyah is not considered to be inheritance. Islaam considers inheritance to be the portions of the deceasedвҖҷs wealth which the law assigns to various family members in the absence of a will. According to the system of Islamic inheritance laws (FaraaвҖҷid), non-Muslims cannot be classified as heirs of Muslims. Likewise, Muslims have no right to take portions of their dead nonMuslim relativesвҖҷ wealth allotted by non-Islamic systems of inheritance. The Prophet (r) was reported to have said, вҖңA Muslim must not inherit from a disbeliever, nor should a disbeliever inherit from a Muslim.вҖқ31 30 Collected by at-Tabaranee and authenticated in Ahkaamul JanaaвҖҷiz ,p.5. 31 Sahih al-Bukhari, vol.8, p.498, no. 756 and Sahih Muslim, vol.3, p.852, no. 3928.

Consequently, the Prophet (r) encouraged Muslims to record a will and keep it as soon as the need arises. ЩҺп»ӯЩ„о Ўпәҙо   пәӯо ЁпәҺ пәғЩҺп»Ҙо  п»Өо Ўп»Ёп№ҫп»¬о   п»Ӣо Ўп»ҖЩҗп»І пәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»Әо   пәӯо  пәӯо  п»Өо Ўп»ҘЩҗ п»Ӣо ўпә©ЩҗпәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»ӘЩҗ пә’о ўпә’о   п»Ӣо ўп»Ҙо  п»Ӣ r п»—п№¶пәҺЩ„ЩҺ :)) о ўпәҙо ЎпәӯЩҗпәүЩҚ п»Өо ўп»•пұЎ пәҚп»Өо  пәҺ пәӨо  п»Ө о Ўп» Щҗп»ЎЩҚ п»ҹп№¶п»Ә о Ўп»©о  пә”п№І п»ӢЩҗп»Ёп№ҫпә©о  п»ңп№ҫпәҳп№ёп»ӯпә’о   п»Өо Ўпәҳп№ёп»Әо ЁпәјЩҗп»ҙо  п»ӯо  п»ҘЩҗ пәҮЩҗп»»пұ  п»ӯо ўп» п№¶пәҳп№¶п»ҙо ўпә’Щҗп»ҙпә•п№ё п»ҹп№¶п»ҙо  п»ӯпәјЩҗп»І п»“Щҗп»ҙп»ӘЩҗ п»ҙо Ў п»ҙо ӨпәҖо ўпәёп№¶п»І ((. вҖңIt is not right for a Muslim who has something to bequeath to pass two nights without having it in writing with him.вҖқ32 32 Reported by Ibn вҖҳUmar and collected in all of the six books of hadith. Sahih al-Bukhari, vol.4, p.1, no.1, Sahih Muslim, vol.3, p.863, no.3987, Sunan Abu Dawud, vol.2, p.805, no.2856, Mishkat Al-Masabih, vol.1, p.656, and Muwatta Imam Malik, p.329, no.1449.

CHAPTER TWO: AFTER DEATH Obligatory Actions on Those Present Once the person expires, the relatives and those present are obliged to perform particular services for him or her.
content_id:
Sebelum meninggal, setiap orang hendaknya menulis atau mendiktekan wasiat yang memberikan hingga sepertiga dari hartanya kepada mereka yang tidak mewarisinya berdasarkan hukum waris. Anjuran ini ditetapkan oleh Allah untuk melindungi hak-hak kerabat dan sahabat yang tidak termasuk ahli waris. Di bawah prinsip wasiat inilah, umat Muslim dapat meninggalkan harta untuk kerabat non-Muslim atau menerima harta dari kerabat non-Muslim yang meninggal. Menurut hukum Islam, harta yang diperoleh melalui wasiat tidak dianggap sebagai warisan. Islam mendefinisikan warisan sebagai bagian-bagian dari harta almarhum yang ditetapkan hukum bagi berbagai anggota keluarga tanpa adanya wasiat. Menurut sistem hukum waris Islam (faraidh), non-Muslim tidak dapat diklasifikasikan sebagai ahli waris Muslim. Demikian pula, Muslim tidak berhak mengambil bagian harta kerabat non-Muslim mereka yang meninggal berdasarkan sistem waris non-Islam. Nabi п·ә dilaporkan bersabda, "Seorang Muslim tidak boleh mewarisi dari orang kafir, dan orang kafir tidak boleh mewarisi dari seorang Muslim."

Oleh karena itu, Nabi п·ә mendorong umat Muslim untuk mencatat wasiat dan menyimpannya segera setelah kebutuhan muncul. Abdullah bin Umar meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah п·ә bersabda, "Tidak pantas bagi seorang Muslim yang memiliki sesuatu untuk diwasiatkan melewati dua malam tanpa wasiatnya tertulis di sisinya."

BAB DUA: SETELAH KEMATIAN вҖ” Tindakan Wajib bagi Mereka yang Hadir. Begitu seseorang meninggal, keluarga dan mereka yang hadir wajib melaksanakan pelayanan tertentu untuknya.

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШӯШЁ Щ„ЩғЩ„ Щ…ШіЩ„Щ… ШЁШ§Щ„Шә Ш№Ш§ЩӮЩ„ ЩғШӘШ§ШЁШ© ЩҲШөЩҠШӘЩҮ ЩӮШЁЩ„ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШӯШ¶ШұЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ¬Щ„. ЩҲЩӮШҜ ШЈШұШҙШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШЁЩҠ п·ә ШҘЩ„Щү Ш°Щ„Щғ ШЁЩӮЩҲЩ„ЩҮ: В«Щ…Ш§ ШӯЩӮЩҸЩ‘ Ш§Щ…ШұШҰ Щ…ШіЩ„Щ… Щ„ЩҮ ШҙЩҠШЎ ЩҠШұЩҠШҜ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠЩҲШөЩҠ ЩҒЩҠЩҮ ЩҠШЁЩҠШӘ Щ„ЩҠЩ„ШӘЩҠЩҶ ШҘЩ„Ш§ ЩҲЩҲШөЩҠШӘЩҮ Щ…ЩғШӘЩҲШЁШ© Ш№ЩҶШҜЩҮВ».
